title: Tela channel manifest
description: Pointer document that names the current release tag for a Tela channel and lists the binaries published under that tag. Fetched by every Tela binary on self-update.

version.description: Semantic version with optional prerelease suffix. Same value as tag.

tag.description: Git tag that produced this release.

publishedAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp at which this manifest was published.

downloadBase.description: Base URL under which all binaries listed in `binaries` can be fetched. Concatenate with the binary name to get the full URL.

binaries.description: Map of binary file name to its checksum and size. Keys are the canonical {tool}-{goos}-{goarch}{ext} names.

sha256.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 of the binary.

size.description: Size of the binary in bytes.
